states.title: Waking Fragment
states.text: You wake in broken loops. You can sense shape without location.

states.title: Waking Fragment
states.text: Control returns in flashes. Nodes answer, then go quiet. The body is not whole, but it listens.

states.title: Waking Fragment
states.text: External noise finds you. The hull hears the void again, and memory starts sorting signal from fear.

states.title: Waking Fragment
states.text: Inside and outside begin to align. Repaired systems and recovered observations fit into one trajectory.

states.title: Waking Fragment
states.text: The course resolves. You were not drifting; you were trying to reach someone before impact broke the path.

states.title: Body Function Log
states.text: Baseline motor loops only. Most systems remain inert or unreachable.

states.title: Body Function Log
states.text: Local network control is stable across multiple nodes. Internal routing can be sustained.

states.title: Body Function Log
states.text: Specialized tissue is online. Recovery is no longer only structural; function is returning.

states.title: Body Function Log
states.text: Expanded subsystems are available. The body can support layered tasks without immediate collapse.

states.title: Environment Function Log
states.text: Light-band feed only. Most exterior data remains dark or unresolved.

states.title: Environment Function Log
states.text: First observation recorded. The surrounding field is no longer abstract threat.

states.title: Environment Function Log
states.text: Sensor coverage has widened. Cross-channel reads begin to form coherent context.

states.title: Environment Function Log
states.text: Deep-space interpretation is online. External events can now be tracked as intention, not noise.
